episodes.title: Jídlo jako evoluční dudlík pro mozek
Keto dieta jako lék na psychiku
Léčba vážných duševních nemocí keto dietou

adicare-zavislost-na-jidle.title: Závislost na jídle, psychogenní přejídání
adicare-zavislost-na-jidle.summary: Article focusing on food addiction and psychogenic overeating, providing clinical insights from the AdiCare clinic.

bretsnajdrova-dietologie.title: Dietologie
bretsnajdrova-dietologie.author: Alena Bretšnajdrová, Dana Müllerová, Štěpán Svačina
bretsnajdrova-dietologie.summary: Komplexní učebnice dietologie zaměřená na klinickou praxi a nutriční management různých onemocnění.

campbell-keto-bipolar.title: Keto Diets for Bipolar
campbell-keto-bipolar.author: Dr. Iain Campbell
campbell-keto-bipolar.summary: Details a pilot study on the use of a ketogenic diet for bipolar disorder.

culinary-services-nutrition-recovery.title: The Importance of Nutrition in Substance Use Recovery
culinary-services-nutrition-recovery.summary: A guide highlighting the critical role of dietitians and nutrition services in the recovery process from substance use disorders.

ede-ketogenic-psychiatry.title: Evidence Base for the Use of Ketogenic Diets in Psychiatry
ede-ketogenic-psychiatry.author: Dr. Georgia Ede, MD
ede-ketogenic-psychiatry.summary: Outlines the clinical rationale and ongoing clinical trials for ketogenic metabolic therapy in neuropsychiatric conditions.

nzip-dieta-uvod.title: Dieta u psychiatrických onemocnění – úvod
nzip-dieta-uvod.author: Czech Medical Association of J. E. Purkyně
nzip-dieta-uvod.summary: Discusses diets in psychiatric disorders from a clinical perspective in the Czech Republic.

paul-nutrient-deficiencies.title: Nutrient deficiencies in patients with psychiatric disorders
paul-nutrient-deficiencies.journal: International Journal of Research in Medical Sciences
paul-nutrient-deficiencies.summary: Original research article investigating the prevalence and impact of nutrient deficiencies in patients diagnosed with psychiatric disorders.

richards-ethics-eating-disorders.title: Ethics in eating disorders
richards-ethics-eating-disorders.author: Lorna Richards (Independent Psychiatrist)
richards-ethics-eating-disorders.summary: Discusses ethical considerations and challenges in the treatment and management of eating disorders.

schaaf-mediterranean-diet-depression.title: The Impact of the Mediterranean Diet on Depression: A Narrative Review
schaaf-mediterranean-diet-depression.author: Emma Kate Schaaf
schaaf-mediterranean-diet-depression.summary: A narrative review exploring the correlation between Mediterranean diet adherence and depressive symptoms.

sunrise-detox-amino-acid-therapy.title: How Is Amino Acid Therapy Used To Treat Addiction?
sunrise-detox-amino-acid-therapy.summary: A web article explaining the application and benefits of amino acid therapy in the context of addiction treatment.

swiss-re-metabolic-psychiatry.title: Metabolic Psychiatry – A new paradigm?
swiss-re-metabolic-psychiatry.summary: Explores metabolic psychiatry as a potential new paradigm in the management of mental health disorders.
